tasks.name: Create a corporate lunch buffet for 25 guests with at least 3 vegetarian dishes under $25 per person
tasks.description: Using the catering website, assemble a corporate lunch buffet package for 25 guests that costs no more than $25 per person and includes at least 3 clearly labeled vegetarian dishes, then add it to the cart and view the cart page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled something like "Corporate Events" or "Business Catering"
On the corporate catering page, select the "Lunch" or "Buffet Lunch" category
Use any available price filters or sliders to set the maximum price per person to $25
Scroll through the listed lunch buffet packages and click on a package that allows menu customization and indicates vegetarian options are available
On the package details page, set the number of guests to 25 in the guest or quantity field
Within the menu customization section, select at least 3 dishes that are labeled as "Vegetarian" (for example, vegetarian appetizers, mains, or sides) and add them to the package selection

If the package allows additional non-vegetarian dishes, optionally select any non-vegetarian items while keeping the package selected as long as it fits under the $25 per person price shown on the page
Click the button such as "Add to Cart" or "Add Package" to place this customized lunch buffet for 25 guests into the cart
Click on the cart icon or link in the header to navigate to the cart summary page displaying the selected lunch buffet package

tasks.name: Request a wedding catering quote for 120 guests with a mid-priced 3-course plated dinner and bar service
tasks.description: Find wedding catering options, choose a 3-course plated dinner package for 120 guests that is not the cheapest or the most expensive option, add standard bar service, select a specific event date, and submit a quote request form.
steps: Go to the website homepage
Click on the navigation link labeled "Weddings" or "Wedding Catering"
On the weddings page, choose the "Plated Dinner" or "Formal Dinner" category
Use any available filter or toggle to limit results to 3-course dinner packages (for example, select a "3 courses" option if present)
Sort the listed dinner packages by price from low to high using a sort dropdown or similar control
From the sorted list, click on a package that is in the middle price range (not the first/cheapest and not the last/most expensive package shown on the first results page)
On the package details page, set the guest count field to 120
Locate the add-ons or extras section and select a standard bar service option (for example, "House Bar" or "Standard Open Bar") to include with the dinner package
Click a button such as "Request Quote" or "Get Estimate" to open the quote request form for this selected package and bar service on a specific date

In the quote form, enter a wedding date by selecting a date from the calendar picker, fill in the name and contact fields with placeholder information (for example, name "Alex Taylor" and email "alex.taylor@example.com"), and submit the quote request using the form's submit button

tasks.name: Choose the cheaper birthday package for 40 guests that includes dessert
tasks.description: Compare at least two birthday party catering packages suitable for 40 guests, each including dessert, and select the cheaper of the two by adding only that package to the cart.
steps: Open the website homepage
Click on the navigation menu item labeled "Parties", "Social Events", or specifically "Birthday Parties"

On the birthday or parties page, use any available guest filter or field to set the guest range or guest count to approximately 40 guests (for example, select a "31–50 guests" range or type 40 in a guest field)
Apply a filter or select a category that shows only packages including dessert (for example, check a "Includes Dessert" option or choose a package type that lists dessert in the title)
From the filtered list, click on the first birthday package that clearly lists dessert in the description to open its details page and note its total price for 40 guests as shown on the page

Use the browser back button or page navigation to return to the list and then click on a second birthday package that also includes dessert to open its details page and note its total price for 40 guests as shown
Determine which of the two viewed packages has the lower total price for 40 guests using the displayed package prices
Navigate back to the package list or use the navigation breadcrumbs to return to the details page of the cheaper of the two dessert-including packages
On the cheaper package’s detail page, set the guest count to 40 if necessary using the quantity or guest field
Click on the "Add to Cart" or equivalent button so that only this cheaper birthday package for 40 guests is placed in the cart

tasks.name: Build a custom dinner menu under $55 per person with 2 appetizers, 2 mains, and 1 dessert
tasks.description: Use the custom menu builder to create a dinner menu that includes at least 2 appetizers, 2 main courses, and 1 dessert while keeping the total menu price at or below $55 per person, then proceed to the menu summary or cart page.
steps: From the homepage, click on a navigation link labeled "Custom Menu", "Build Your Own", or similar
On the custom menu or build-your-own page, select "Dinner" as the meal type using a radio button, dropdown, or tab
If a budget or price-per-person field is available, enter 55 as the maximum price per person
In the appetizers section, scroll through the list and add 2 different appetizer dishes by clicking their "Add" or "+" buttons
In the main courses section, scroll and select 2 different main dishes by clicking the corresponding "Add" or "+" buttons
In the desserts section, scroll and select 1 dessert item by clicking its "Add" or "+" button

If there is a per-person price indicator or total on the page, adjust by removing or replacing any dish if necessary by clicking its "Remove" or "X" button so that the displayed price per person does not exceed $55
Set the number of guests to any value between 20 and 30 by entering a number in the guest count field (for example, "25")
Click on a button such as "Review Menu", "View Summary", or "Add Menu to Cart" to proceed to the summary or cart page showing this custom dinner menu
Navigate to the cart or summary section using the on-page button or cart icon so that the built menu appears as a single line item

tasks.name: Book the earliest available Saturday evening in July 2025 for an 80-guest event
tasks.description: Use the booking calendar to find the earliest Saturday in July 2025 with an available evening catering time slot for 80 guests, select that date and time, and fill in the basic event details form until reaching the booking summary page (no payment required).
steps: Navigate to the website homepage
Click on a navigation item labeled "Book Now", "Check Availability", or similar
On the booking or availability page, open the date picker or calendar control
Use the month and year controls to navigate the calendar to July 2025
Within July 2025, identify the earliest Saturday that shows an available status indicator for an evening time slot and click on that Saturday date
From the list of time slot options for that date, select an evening slot (for example, a slot that starts at or after 5:00 PM)
In the guest count field, enter 80 as the number of guests
Click a button such as "Continue", "Next", or "Proceed" to go to the event details form

On the event details form, enter a placeholder event name (for example, "Quarterly Celebration"), select an event type that matches a corporate or social event from a dropdown, and enter placeholder contact information (for example, name "Jordan Lee" and phone number "555-123-4567")
Submit the event details form using the "Continue" or "Review Booking" button to reach the booking summary page showing the selected July 2025 Saturday evening slot for 80 guests

tasks.name: Apply a 15% promo code to a 60-guest package with 2 add-ons and reach a total under $2,600
tasks.description: Select a catering package suitable for 60 guests priced at or under $50 per person, add exactly 2 paid add-ons, proceed toward checkout, apply the promo code "SAVE15", and reach an order summary page where the discounted total for 60 guests is under $2,600.
steps: Start on the homepage
Click on a general "Menus", "Packages", or "All Events" navigation link to view all catering packages
Use any available guest filter or field to set the guest count or range to 60 guests (for example, by typing 60 in a guest field or choosing a "51–75 guests" range)
Apply a price or budget filter so that only packages with a base price per person of $50 or less are shown
From the filtered list, click on any package that meets the price condition to open its details page
On the package details page, set the guest count to exactly 60 in the guest or quantity field
Scroll to the add-ons or extras section and select exactly 2 paid add-ons by clicking their "Add" or "+" buttons
Click the "Add to Cart" or similar button to place this 60-guest package with 2 add-ons into the cart
Open the cart or checkout page by clicking the cart icon or a "Checkout" button in the header or cart section

On the cart or checkout page, locate the promo or discount code field, type "SAVE15" into the field, and click the "Apply" or "Update" button to apply the 15% discount before proceeding to the final order summary section

tasks.name: Create a gluten-free tasting list with 3 items (including 1 dessert) rated 4+ stars
tasks.description: Search the full menu for gluten-free items, filter to show only dishes with ratings of at least 4 stars, and add 2 savory items and 1 dessert to a tasting list or favorites list so that all 3 selected items are labeled gluten-free.
steps: From the homepage, click on a navigation item such as "Full Menu", "Browse Dishes", or "All Items"
In the menu page search or filter area, select or check a dietary option labeled "Gluten-Free"
Use a rating filter or sort option to restrict results to items with a rating of 4 stars or higher (for example, by choosing a "4+ stars" filter)
Scroll through the filtered list and click on the first gluten-free savory item (such as an appetizer or main course that is not labeled as dessert) to open its details page
On the item details page, click a button such as "Add to Tasting List", "Add to Favorites", or a heart icon to add this savory item to the tasting or favorites list

Return to the filtered results using the back button or a breadcrumb link and select a second gluten-free savory item (another non-dessert dish) by opening its details page and adding it to the same tasting or favorites list using the same button or icon
Navigate back to the list again and scroll to find a gluten-free dessert item (for example, an item labeled as "Dessert" or listed in a dessert section) and open its details page
Add this gluten-free dessert to the tasting or favorites list by clicking the same "Add to Tasting List", "Add to Favorites", or heart icon control
Click on the "Tasting List", "Favorites", or equivalent link or icon in the header or menu to open the page that displays the selected gluten-free tasting items
View the tasting list page where these 3 gluten-free items are now grouped together as part of a tasting set

tasks.name: Schedule coffee break catering for 50 guests on three consecutive conference days
tasks.description: Set up morning coffee break catering for a conference with 50 guests on three consecutive days (e.g., May 10, 11, and 12, 2025) by adding a coffee break package for each date as separate line items and then visiting the cart summary.
steps: Go to the website homepage
Click on a category link such as "Corporate Events", "Meetings", or specifically "Coffee Breaks"
On the coffee break packages page, select a morning coffee break package (for example, one labeled "Morning Coffee & Pastries") by clicking its card or title to open the details page
On the package details page, set the number of guests to 50 in the guest count or quantity field
Choose the first conference date (for example, use a date picker to select May 10, 2025) as the event date for this coffee break and click a button such as "Add to Cart" or "Add to Order"

Remain on or return to the same coffee break package details page and change the event date to the next day (for example, May 11, 2025) while keeping the guest count at 50, then click the "Add to Cart" or "Add to Order" button again to create a second line item

Repeat this process once more by setting the event date to the following day (for example, May 12, 2025) with 50 guests and clicking the "Add to Cart" or "Add to Order" button to add the third line item
After adding the three dated coffee break line items, click on the cart icon or a "View Cart" button to open the cart summary page
On the cart summary page, scroll if necessary so that all three separate coffee break entries for 50 guests on the three consecutive dates are visible in the list

entities.name: PackageCategory

fields.name: code
fields.description: Matches categoryId URL parameter values

entities.description: Event/package categories including corporate events, weddings, parties & birthdays, coffee breaks, and an All Packages pseudo-category

entities.name: Package

fields.name: categoryCode
fields.description: Primary category of the package

fields.name: mealType
fields.description: High-level meal type such as lunch, dinner, coffee_break

fields.name: serviceStyle
fields.description: Service style such as buffet or plated

fields.name: courseCount
fields.description: Number of courses (e.g., 3 for 3-course dinner)

fields.name: minPricePerPerson
fields.description: Lower bound of per-person price range if variable

fields.name: maxPricePerPerson
fields.description: Upper bound of per-person price range if variable

fields.name: includesDessert
fields.description: True if package clearly includes dessert

fields.name: vegetarianFriendly
fields.description: True if vegetarian options are offered

fields.name: allowsMenuCustomization
fields.description: True if user can pick specific dishes within the package

fields.name: allowsDateSelection
fields.description: True if an event date can be set per line item (e.g., coffee breaks)

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Array of tag strings such as 'corporate', 'wedding', etc.

entities.description: Catering packages for different event types (corporate lunches, weddings, birthdays, coffee breaks, etc.)

entities.name: PackageMenuSection

fields.name: name
fields.description: Section name like 'Appetizers', 'Mains', 'Desserts'

fields.name: minSelection
fields.description: Minimum number of items user must select in this section

fields.name: maxSelection
fields.description: Maximum number of items user can select in this section

fields.name: dishTypeFilter
fields.description: Default dish type for items in this section

fields.name: allowOnlyVegetarian
fields.description: If true, only vegetarian dishes should be shown

entities.description: Logical sections within a package for menu customization (e.g., buffet sections)

entities.name: PackageMenuItem

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: True if this dish is included by default in the package

fields.name: additionalPricePerPerson
fields.description: Additional per-person cost if this dish is chosen

fields.name: isVegetarianOnlyOption
fields.description: True if this option is explicitly the vegetarian choice

entities.description: Selectable dish options within a package's menu sections

entities.name: Dish

fields.name: dishType
fields.description: Type of dish (used to distinguish savory vs dessert)

fields.name: isSavory
fields.description: True for non-dessert savory items

fields.name: dietaryTags
fields.description: Additional dietary tags such as 'dairy-free', 'nut-free'

fields.name: pricePerPerson
fields.description: Used in custom menus and possibly package pricing

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Average star rating, used for 4+ stars filter

entities.description: Individual dishes (appetizers, mains, desserts, etc.) with dietary flags and ratings

entities.name: AddOn

fields.name: category
fields.description: Type of add-on; bar_service covers options like standard open bar

fields.name: priceType
fields.description: Determines if price is per person or a flat fee

fields.name: isPaid
fields.description: True if the add-on costs extra

fields.name: isBarService
fields.description: True for bar service options like standard open bar

fields.name: applicablePackageCategoryCode
fields.description: Primary package category this add-on is designed for

entities.description: Optional paid extras such as bar service, extra courses, or equipment

entities.name: CustomMenu

fields.name: name
fields.description: Label such as 'Custom Dinner Menu'

fields.name: mealType
fields.description: For this site, primarily 'dinner' for the custom dinner builder

fields.name: budgetPerPerson
fields.description: User-entered budget cap per person (e.g., 55)

fields.name: selectedAppetizerIds
fields.description: Array of dish IDs selected as appetizers

fields.name: selectedMainIds
fields.description: Array of dish IDs selected as mains

fields.name: selectedDessertIds
fields.description: Array of dish IDs selected as desserts

fields.name: selectedOtherDishIds
fields.description: Any additional dish IDs if the builder supports them

fields.name: pricePerPerson
fields.description: Calculated per-person cost based on selected dishes

fields.name: totalPrice
fields.description: Calculated total price for guestCount

entities.description: Runtime representation of a user-built custom menu (e.g., dinner with 2 apps, 2 mains, 1 dessert)

entities.name: Cart

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of CartItem IDs representing packages, custom menus, and dated coffee breaks

fields.name: appliedPromoCode
fields.description: Code like 'SAVE15' if applied

fields.name: promoDiscountAmount
fields.description: Total discount amount from promo codes

fields.name: subtotal
fields.description: Total before any discounts

entities.description: Shopping cart for the single user, including promo code application and totals

entities.name: CartItem

fields.name: itemType
fields.description: Distinguishes regular packages from custom menus and other item types

fields.name: packageId
fields.description: Set when itemType is 'package'

fields.name: customMenuId
fields.description: Set when itemType is 'custom_menu'

fields.name: name
fields.description: Snapshot name of the package or custom menu

fields.name: eventDate
fields.description: Event date for this line item (used for dated coffee breaks, etc.)

fields.name: selectedDishIds
fields.description: Dish IDs selected in this package line (e.g., vegetarian dishes in a buffet)

fields.name: selectedAddonIds
fields.description: Add-on IDs chosen for this item (e.g., 2 paid add-ons, standard bar service)

entities.description: Individual line items in the cart, including package/custom menu configuration, date, and add-ons

entities.name: PromoCode

fields.name: code
fields.description: Promo code string such as 'SAVE15'

fields.name: discountValue
fields.description: For 'SAVE15', value = 15

fields.name: minimumOrderTotal
fields.description: Minimum cart total required to apply this code

fields.name: maximumDiscountAmount
fields.description: Cap on discount if applicable

entities.description: Promotional discount codes such as SAVE15 used at checkout

entities.name: AvailabilitySlot

fields.name: date
fields.description: Calendar date of the slot (date part used)

fields.name: startTime
fields.description: Start time, e.g., '17:00'

fields.name: endTime
fields.description: End time, e.g., '22:00'

fields.name: period
fields.description: Used to identify evening slots for tasks like earliest Saturday evening in July 2025

fields.name: maxGuests
fields.description: Maximum guests that can be served in this slot

entities.description: Bookable time slots on the availability calendar

entities.name: Booking

fields.name: eventDate
fields.description: Date of the booking (copied from slot)

fields.name: eventName
fields.description: User-entered event name like 'Quarterly Celebration'

fields.name: eventType
fields.description: Category of the event selected in the booking details form

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle status of the booking

entities.description: Event bookings created after selecting an availability slot and filling out event details

entities.name: QuoteRequest

fields.name: packageName
fields.description: Snapshot name of the selected package

fields.name: selectedAddonIds
fields.description: IDs of add-ons included in the quote (e.g., standard bar service)

entities.description: Requests for detailed quotes, such as a wedding 3-course plated dinner with bar service

entities.name: TastingList

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name such as 'Tasting List' or 'Favorites'

fields.name: type
fields.description: Helps distinguish tasting sets vs general favorites

entities.description: Container for the user's saved tasting or favorites dishes

entities.name: TastingListItem
entities.description: Join records connecting dishes to a tasting list (e.g., 3 gluten-free items rated 4+ stars)

entities.name: ContactInquiry
entities.description: General inquiries submitted via the Contact page

entities.name: FAQItem
entities.description: Frequently asked questions about ordering, pricing, dietary needs, and bookings

entities.name: PolicyPage
entities.description: Policy pages including privacy, terms of service, and cancellation/refund rules

entities.name: MenuFilterState

fields.name: viewType
fields.description: Matches view_type URL parameter; currently only 'all_items' is used

fields.name: dietaryFilter
fields.description: Filter for dietary options such as 'gluten_free'

fields.name: minRating
fields.description: Minimum dish rating filter, e.g., 4 for 4+ stars

fields.name: searchQuery
fields.description: Text search term for dishes

entities.description: Transient state representing filters applied on the Full Menu (dishes listing) page

entities.name: PackageFilterState

fields.name: categoryFilter
fields.description: Matches categoryId URL parameter; used on Packages Listing

fields.name: guestCount
fields.description: Guest count or range center, e.g., 25, 40, 50, 60, 80, 120

fields.name: vegetarianOnly
fields.description: True to show packages with vegetarian-friendly options only

fields.name: courseCount
fields.description: Filter to an exact course count, e.g., 3 for 3-course dinners

fields.name: sortBy
fields.description: Sorting criterion used on the packages listing

entities.description: Transient state representing filters and sorting applied on the Packages Listing page
